base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_pen_composite_reference — a ui from 1980 pac man. Ghost-pen (spawn-box) rendering with all 4 ghosts inside at their canonical spawn-positions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ghost-pen (spawn-box) rendering with all 4 ghosts inside at their canonical spawn-positions; used as placement reference for level-start
